---
title: "R and RStudio"
categories: [R, RStudio]
listing: 
    contents:
        - "*.qmd"
        - "!index.qmd"
    fields: [title, description, date-modified]
    type: table
    sort: "date-modified desc"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    categories: true
sidebar: note
---

R 기본 문법 및 확장 패키지, RStudio IDE
